ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT ORIARTE, DUANE B.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ORIARTE, DUANE B. DOES 1 TO 20 THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 233 PARKER AVE. #304, SAN FRANCISCO, CA $1,500.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, STAYED UNTIL NOV-07-1995, LEASE FORFEITED

JUDGE:GEORGE T. CHOPPELAS;CLERK;ECLAVERIA;RPTR:MAUREEN BRADY 3:03PM: C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. PLFF APPEARED THRU COUNSEL ADHAM RAN I NASSER, AND DEFT PRESENT, REPRESENTING PROPER. CASE SETTLED AND TERMS OF SETTLEMENT STATED ON THE RECORD BY PLFF'S COUNSEL - FIRST,COURT STATED THAT THERE IS ANOTHER OCCUPANT OF THE PREMISES AND IS PRESENT TODAY, NAMED GARY CLUBB - BOTH HE AND DEFT DUANE B. ORIARTE ARE PRESENT AND REPRESENTING THEMSELVES. CONDITIONS ARE AS FOLLOWS: THIS IS A JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFTS FOR $1500, RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 233 PARKER AVE,#304,SF,CA;DEFTS TO MOVE OUT ON/BEFORE 11/7/95; JUDGMENT STAYED TO 11/7/95. AFTER PAYMENT OF THE AMOUNT, SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT BE MADE BY PLFF. PLFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT - TO BE SENT TO DEFTS FOR APPROVAL BEFORE SENDING IT TO COURT.
